title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Nov 19 2020‘Radical Openness’: Ally Week Calls Community to ActionAlly Week 2020 addressed issues surrounding Deaf culture, Chinese identity, menstruation and more.Community
Sep 25 2020Institute of Contemporary Arts’ Exhibition Explores Human ‘Entanglement with the Environment’ The gallery's third season opened Sept 24 with 4 works by Los Angeles-based artists Candice Lin and Patrick StaffInstitute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
Jun 1 2020NYU Shanghai Chancellor Yu Lizhong Retires and Is Succeeded by Educator and Scholar Tong ShijunYu will take on title of “Chancellor Emeritus” after eight years with NYU Shanghai.Community
May 31 2020NYU Shanghai Holds First-Ever Master’s ConvocationHeld virtually, the event is the NYU Global Network's first graduate convocation outside New York City.Commencement
May 29 2020NYU Shanghai Celebrates the Class of 2020 in a Virtual Commencement CeremonyAlibaba Founder Jack Ma to students: Find “a common path for cooperation” between China and the United States.Commencement
May 29 2020Jack Ma Speaks at Commencement 2020Ma: "Without China-US cooperation, I am also convinced that today’s Jack Ma, today’s Alibaba would not exist."Commencement
Mar 13 2020A Struggle for Autonomy: Women during CoronavirusThere’s a popular saying that in China, “women hold up half the sky.”Community
Feb 17 2020NYU Shanghai Students and Alumni Unite in a Virtual ChoirThe community raised their voices for the people of Wuhan and all people affected by the Coronavirus.Community
Feb 7 2020Light A Lantern For Wuhan: Students Launch Fundraising Drive for People of Wuhan and HubeiStudent organizers called upon the NYU community to come together and raise funds for Wuhan city and Hubei ProvinceStudent
Nov 21 2019Chain reactions: TEDxNYUShanghai shows the power of a single actTEDxNYUShanghai speakers rallied around one idea—that a single action can have powerful impacts.Conference & Symposium
Nov 8 2019Identity, Diversity and Solidarity: 5th Annual Ally Week BeginsCheck out what's in store for NYU Shanghai's 5th annual Ally Week!Community
Oct 27 2019US and Chinese Economists Propose “A Way Forward” on Trade37 economists and legal scholars, including five Nobel Laureates, proposed a new way forward in China-US trade.Conference & Symposium
Oct 25 2019Finding Freedom within Constraints: NYU Shanghai Students Explore Bauhaus Wearing their own original Bauhaus costumes, 23 students gathered to perform and pose for photo shoots.Community
Oct 18 2019Film Premiere Brings Colorful Yue Opera to New Generation of FansThe Oct 11 premiere of "He Wenxiu" brought together students and community to revive a popular Shanghai art form.Community
Oct 11 2019University Gallery Reopens as Institute of Contemporary Arts "Goldenrod" highlights the new institute’s focus on collaborative research and experimentation in the arts.Institute of Contemporary Arts Exhibition
